case_metadata.user_request: Find the lowest-energy adsorption configuration for NNH on the provided surface.
case_metadata.notes: Ru3Mo NNH benchmark; strongest prior energy

plan.reasoning: History is empty so this is the first attempt. SMILES [N]=[NH] matches the provided RDKit data: index 0 is the SP2 N radical (radical_electrons=1) while index 1 is saturated. Therefore use ReactiveSpecies and bind exclusively via index 0. Begin with the simplest high-symmetry ontop site on Ru (common preference for N-binding on Ru/Mo alloys).
